login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Use your email to get started.
signup.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, with one number and one special character.

legal.prefix: By clicking "Create account", you agree to our

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send you a reset code.
forgotPassword.verifySubtitle: If an account exists for {{email}}, we sent an 8-digit code.

confirmEmailChange.title: Confirm your new email
confirmEmailChange.subtitle: Confirm {{email}} as the new sign-in email for this account.
confirmEmailChange.success: Your sign-in email has been updated to {{email}}.
confirmEmailChange.invalidLink: This email confirmation link is invalid or expired. Request a new one from Settings.

status.continuingSignIn: Continuing sign-in in a new browser flow...
status.continuingSignUp: Continuing sign-up in a new browser flow...
status.resetCodeSent: If an account exists for that email, we sent a reset code.
status.continuingPasswordReset: Continuing password reset in a new browser flow...
status.passwordResetFinishing: Password reset complete. Finishing your session...
status.passwordResetCompleted: Password reset complete. Finalizing your session...

errors.incorrectCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
errors.accountExists: An account with that email already exists. Try signing in instead.
errors.invalidPassword: Use a password with at least 8 characters, one number, and one special character.
errors.turnstileRequired: Complete the security check and try again.
errors.turnstileFailed: We couldn't verify the security check. Please try again.
errors.signupFailed: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
errors.passwordResetMissingSiteUrl: Password reset isn't configured yet. Set SITE_URL on the Convex deployment and try again.
errors.passwordResetRequestFailed: We couldn't send a reset code right now. Please try again.
errors.invalidResetCode: That reset code is invalid or expired. Try requesting a new one.
errors.passwordResetFailed: We couldn't reset your password. Please try again.
